description: 3rd-party Magento module -> Adobe-native equivalent map, consumed by the AIRA migrate profiler's 3rd-party->REPLACE classification. Cited to Adobe migration guidance. The IDE compiles each `pattern` with `flags` into a case-insensitive RegExp and matches it against `<module> <composer.name> <require>`. Mirrors the in-IDE bundled fallback (ADOBE_EQUIVALENTS in airaModuleProfile.ts); the registry is the live source, the IDE keeps a bundled snapshot for offline.

equivalents.equivalent: Adobe Commerce Payment Services (or a certified App Builder integration)
ACCS shipping + the Integration Starter Kit
